violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by prep table. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Soap and paper towel was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by dishes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. PIC moved to sheet pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Prep unit and freezer (2 door) door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Observed drain plug for three bay (wash sink) in poor repair. Drain plugs are required to properly wash, rinse and sanitize dishes. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The hoods/ventilation have an accumulation of grease buildup and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The wall behind ware washing area has an accumulation of black and brown residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
